scripts.build: docker build -t web-server:v1 ./webServer && docker build -t data-server:v1 ./dataManager
scripts.init: npm run init-swarm && npm run init-registry
scripts.init-registry: docker service create --name registry --publish published=5000,target=5000 registry:2
scripts.update: docker service update --image web-server:v1 webstack_web && docker service update --image data-server:v1 webstack_data
